subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! In the nights and days the verses of God have been sent down, His evidences made manifest, His call raised high, and His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یوسف در لیالی و ایام آیات الله نازل و بیناتش ظاهر و ندایش مرتفع و صراطش
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations
